messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "593bb811-54d3-49aa-9bc8-73a9b74202fa", "article_id": "8a162fa5-7dfa-4f67-a525-6d3fdd750e8f", "source_name": "NYLON", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "product_promotion_event", "brand": "Youth To The People", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["guests were invited to scan the back of their place cards to get special swag including the iconic Kale + Green Tea Spinach Vitamins Superfood Cleanser and the Youthscreen Sunscreen", "An array of the brand's signature products was artfully woven into the tablescapes"], "anchor_json": {"gift_mechanism": "QR code on place cards", "product_placement": "tablescapes with wooden pedestals", "brand": "Youth To The People"}}]}
